disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New one-sided (right temple) headache that came on today in an older adult
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's on the right side of my head, around the temple, and it came on earlier today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: About a week of feeling run-down, tired and generally achy
trigger_question_examples: Have you been feeling unwell in yourself lately?
Any tiredness, aches or feeling run-down recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've been tired and a bit achy all over for about a week.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No pain or cramping in the jaw when chewing food
trigger_question_examples: Do you get any pain or tiredness in your jaw when you chew?
Does chewing food bring on aching in your jaw?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my jaw is fine — no pain at all when I chew.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Scalp is not tender — no soreness when brushing or touching the scalp
trigger_question_examples: Is your scalp sore or tender when you brush your hair or touch it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my scalp doesn't hurt when I brush my hair.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Vision currently completely normal — no blurring, no double vision, no shadow or curtain over the eye
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your eyesight — blurring, double vision, or a shadow over your vision?
Any loss of vision, even briefly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my eyesight is completely normal right now — no blurring and no double vision.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense fear of going blind, triggered by a friend's phone call rather than by a new symptom
trigger_question_examples: What worries you most about this?
What made you decide to seek help tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My friend rang and said a headache like this could make me go blind overnight, and I've been terrified ever since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The headache eased slightly with a simple over-the-counter painkiller
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it? Did it help?
Does anything make the headache better or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took a paracetamol and it took the edge off a little.
